summary: Iteration 4 — workout detail + inline logging + summary. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases pass for /profiles/{id}/workouts/today and /profiles/{id}/workouts/complete (shape, seeded last_log presence, range-reps regression, 400 on zero sets, 404 on unknown profile, session upsert, no _id leak). Frontend: full Playwright flow on mobile viewport (390x844) confirms all required testIDs and behaviors — workout-today-root loads, workout-title shows workout name, exercise-0 expanded by default with 'Last time · 4 × 6 · 60 kg' (reps NOT '68' — string-join bug not present), weight stepper steps by 2.5 (60→62.5), header toggle collapses/expands body via LayoutAnimation, completing a set mounts rest-timer with correct MM:SS (2:30 = 150s for Bench Press), +15s and skip work, un-completing a set does NOT re-trigger the timer, totals update live, finish is disabled at 0 sets and enabled after, POST /workouts/complete + router.replace('/workout/summary') works end-to-end, summary-root renders title/volume/sets/deltas/per-exercise breakdown, delta uses arrow-down + slate (never red) when regressed vs seed, and summary-empty + summary-back-home render when storage is empty.
critical_code_review_comments: Font warnings 'OTS parsing error: invalid sfntVersion' spam the console (Inter-*.ttf failing to decode). Not iteration-4 scope but cosmetically noisy; likely a metro/asset routing quirk. Non-blocking.
workout-back button is nice-to-have but not listed in required testIDs — currently uses testID 'workout-back'. Fine.
seed_data_creation: Created ~17 TEST_-prefixed profiles across pytest and UI runs. Each auto-seeds sessions + logged_workouts via existing backend logic. Prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully passing. /workouts/today returns seeded last_log correctly (Back Squat '6-8' → reps ~6, not 68). Rest timer overlay renders via mobile viewport with correct testIDs (rest-timer, rest-timer-value, rest-timer-add, rest-timer-skip). Router.replace to /workout/summary works and lastSummary is read from AsyncStorage/localStorage.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
